title: poa subnudiflora
intro: Poa subnudiflora, also known as desert bluegrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Poa subnudiflora are attributed to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Poa subnudiflora can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it has also been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat wounds and promote healing.
